name: zero_velocity_zero_threshold_boundary
description: velocity = 0 AND threshold = 0. Inline uses >= so (0 >= 0) is True; currently_armed=False; should_arm=True. Pins the degenerate but valid case where any non-decreasing tick arms. A wrong impl using strict > would emit False here. Also catches an impl that special-cases zero velocity to never arm.
derivation: velocity = current_return - prev_return = 0.0 - 0.0 = 0.0. should_arm = (velocity >= para_threshold) AND (not currently_armed) = (0.0 >= 0.0) AND (not False) = True AND True = True. Inclusive >= boundary.
